last_envelope.message: I've created aidlc-docs/inception/requirements/requirement-verification-questions.md with 42 verification questions (40 ratification questions over the vision.md / tech-environment.md inputs plus 2 extension opt-in questions for security-baseline and property-based-testing). Please fill in the [Answer]: tags using the lettered choices (use option X) Other and a description if none of the supplied choices fit), then reply 'done' or re-run /aidlc-project-inception when complete.
